name: Arturia MicroFreak
use: Digital synth leads, pads, bass, wavetable, semi-modular matrix routing, sequencer
overview: Semi-modular hybrid with digital oscillator + analog filter. The Matrix patch board routes any mod source to any destination. Includes arpeggiator, two step sequencers (A/B), Cycling Envelope generator, and Spice/Dice randomizer.
workflow: Turn <kbd>Preset Encoder</kbd> to browse presets → press to load
Turn <kbd>TYPE</kbd> knob to select oscillator (Wavetable, VCO, Harmonic, Speech, Karplus, etc.); turn <kbd>WAVE / TIMBRE / SHAPE</kbd> to sculpt tone
Turn <kbd>CUTOFF</kbd> → <kbd>RESONANCE</kbd> → <kbd>ENV AMOUNT</kbd> to shape filter sweep
Enable Cycling Envelope: press <kbd>Cycling Env</kbd> button → acts as LFO for continuous modulation
Patch modulation: hold <kbd>Assign1</kbd> (or Assign2/3) + turn any destination knob to create a matrix route
Arpeggiator: press <kbd>Arp|Seq</kbd> (lights white) → hold a chord on flat keyboard → arpeggio plays
Sequencer: press <kbd>Arp|Seq</kbd> again (lights orange) → press <kbd>Record</kbd> → play notes → press <kbd>Record</kbd> to stop
Move arpeggio to sequence: <kbd>Shift</kbd> + <kbd>Up|A</kbd> → sends arp to Seq A; <kbd>Shift</kbd> + <kbd>Order|B</kbd> → Seq B
Long press <kbd>Save</kbd> → quick-save; or <kbd>Save</kbd> + turn Preset Encoder to name and save

shortcuts.action: Browse presets; press to see category ★
Save to specific slot
Quick save current preset ★
Jump between character ranges (A, a, 0, .) when naming
Reset current preset to Init state ★
Panel Mode — sound matches current knob positions ★
Init Preset (factory reset current sound)
Utility Menu — global settings (MIDI, CV, Sync) ★
Cycle through 17+ engines: VA, Wavetable, Harmonic, Speech, Karplus, etc.
Basic tone / source — meaning varies by engine
Harmonic content — meaning varies by engine
Texture or pulse width — meaning varies by engine
Assign matrix routing: source row → dest knob ★
Set modulation amount (positive or negative) at intersection
Quick Clear — reset modulation point to zero ★
Reset modulation amount at current point to zero
Toggle Cycling Envelope on
Triggered once per key press
Free-running LFO (ignores key triggers)
Retriggers itself continuously ★
Set swing / shuffle rate ★
Set attack shape of Cycling Envelope
Set decay shape of Cycling Envelope
Toggle between Arpeggiator and Sequencer mode ★
Transpose arpeggio
Transfer current arpeggio to Sequencer A ★
Transfer current arpeggio to Sequencer B
Sync LFO to clock divisions (1/8, 1/4, etc.) ★
Toggle metronome
Real-time sequence record ★
Step record — enter notes one by one
Randomize sequence / pattern
Apply Spice — controlled randomness amount
Set pattern length: 16 / 32 / 48 / 64 steps ★
Chord Mode — record polyphonic step chords ★
Clear current sequence ★
Clear Sequence A

Erase modulation track
Transpose entire sequence
Reload Pattern A/B from last saved state in memory

tips: Cycling Envelope as free LFO: set Mode=Run → patch to Filter or Pitch in Matrix → continuous modulation without a dedicated LFO
Matrix has 5 sources × 7 destinations — Assign1/2/3 can route the SAME source to different destinations simultaneously (stack modulations)
Panel Mode (Shift+Panel): snaps all synth params to physical knob positions — useful after loading a preset whose sound doesn't match knobs
Spice+Dice workflow: Dice randomizes the pattern; Spice strip sets HOW MUCH randomness applies — great for evolving sequences
LFO sync: Shift+LFO Rate snaps to musical divisions (1/8, 1/4, 1/2) so modulation locks to tempo ★
Chord Mode (Shift+Paraphonic): hold multiple keys during step-record → entire chord stored per step — paraphonic voicing
Arpeggiator Pattern mode: new key press = new semi-random pattern from held chord; root note plays 2× as often
USB grounding noise on touch keys: use the provided wall adapter (not PC USB) to eliminate hum
CV/Gate/Pressure jacks on rear: connect to any Eurorack or semi-modular gear; select clock type in Utility menu

soundDesign.name: Analog Lead
soundDesign.goal: Bright biting lead with filter sweep
steps: TYPE → VCO | WAVE = square | TIMBRE = pulse width
CUTOFF mid | RESONANCE 40% | ENV AMOUNT high
Envelope: fast Attack, short Decay, 0 Sustain, short Release
Matrix: Cycling Env (Loop) → Filter Cutoff | CE Rise/Fall = speed of sweep
Matrix: Velocity → Pitch (small amount) for expressive dynamics

soundDesign.name: Wavetable Pad
soundDesign.goal: Evolving, lush pad that slowly morphs
steps: TYPE → Wavetable | WAVE = start position in wavetable
TIMBRE = spectral tilt | SHAPE = interpolation style
Envelope: slow Attack (3–5s), full Sustain, long Release
Matrix: LFO → WAVE (slow rate, triangle) — wavetable scan
Matrix: Cycling Env (Run) → Cutoff for slow filter breathe

soundDesign.name: FM Bass
soundDesign.goal: Punchy FM-style bass with click attack
steps: TYPE → VPM | TIMBRE = mod index (brightness/clang) | SHAPE = ratio
CUTOFF 60% | RESONANCE low | ENV AMOUNT medium
Envelope: instant Attack, medium Decay, 0 Sustain, short Release
Matrix: Envelope → Timbre (positive, amount ~50%) — click on attack
Start with SHAPE=1 (fundamental), increase for harmonics

soundDesign.name: Pluck / Karplus
soundDesign.goal: Plucked string, marimba, or pizzicato sound
steps: TYPE → Karplus | WAVE = exciter type (noise vs. sine) | TIMBRE = decay time
SHAPE = tone color (bright ↔ dark)
Filter CUTOFF high (let harmonics through) | minimal Resonance
Envelope: instant Attack, short Decay (or off), 0 Sustain
Matrix: Velocity → Timbre — harder hits = longer sustain

soundDesign.name: Speech / Formant Lead
soundDesign.goal: Talking synth, vowel morph, robotic vocal
steps: TYPE → Speech | TIMBRE = vowel selection (A E I O U) | SHAPE = formant spread
WAVE = phoneme blend / pitch of formant
Step-sequence different TIMBRE values via Mod track (Oct|Mod button in Seq)
Matrix: Envelope → Timbre — vowel opens on each note hit
Slow LFO → WAVE for continuous vowel animation

soundDesign.name: Noisy Texture
soundDesign.goal: Atmospheric bed, wind, percussion noise layer
steps: TYPE → Noise (or Meta/Granular) | WAVE = color/grain size | TIMBRE = density
CUTOFF low-mid | RESONANCE moderate for tone
Cycling Env Mode=Loop, Rise/Fall both slow
Matrix: CE Loop → Cutoff (slow breath) | CE Loop → Timbre
Assign1: CE → Pitch (small amount) for subtle pitch drift
soundDesign.matrix: CE Loop → Cutoff | CE Loop → Timbre

soundDesign.name: Evolving Sequence
steps: Record 16-step sequence | set Pattern Length to 16
Dice → randomize pitch / rhythm | Spice strip to ~40% controlled chaos
Matrix: CE (Loop) → Pitch (small amount) — micro pitch drift
Matrix: LFO → Cutoff for filter movement across sequence
Shift+LFO Rate to sync LFO to 1/4 or 1/8 note divisions

soundDesign.name: Chord Pad (Paraphonic)
soundDesign.goal: Full chord voicings held across sequencer steps
steps: Press Shift+Paraphonic to enter Chord Mode in sequencer
During step record: hold multiple keys → chord stored per step
Different chord per step — voice lead across progression
Slow attack + long release envelope for pad-like feel
Matrix: CE (Env) → Cutoff — filter opens briefly on each chord hit
